summary: The South Bay's funding frenzy continues: Nexthop AI and Ayar Labs each closed $500M rounds, while Frore Systems and Sunday landed $143M and $165M respectively. Meanwhile, most of the region's tech workforce remains stable, with 7 companies actively hiring and only 2 pulling back—a sign that despite macro uncertainty, local startups are doubling down on growth. This week's Aging with Dignity in the Digital Age event at Santa Clara County Library highlights how voice AI is reshaping everyday life for residents.
